payload.label: side table
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark brown wooden side table with a rectangular top and carved cabriole-style legs; tabletop shows a green fabric bag and stacked papers, the wood has a slightly worn glossy finish and a visible apron beneath the top — estimated ~0.8 m from the camera.
attributes: items on top: green bag and papers
